title: NORA AI
description: Gemini se inspired ek fast AI assistant jo Gemini 2.5 Flash-style model par kaam karta hai. Ye quick responses, smart answers, content writing, aur daily tasks ke liye optimized hai. Speed, efficiency, aur simple user experience ke saath modern AI assistance deta hai.

title: PortFolio
description: This is my old portfolio project built without a backend (frontend-only). It focuses on a clean UI, responsive design, and smooth user experience. The main goal of this project was to showcase my design skills, layout understanding, and basic frontend functionality.
